title: Nekomamushi Awakens
description: On pages 4–7, this part focuses on nekomamushi awakens within the The Two Kings of Zou storyline.
scene: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Cassar's "Poison Gas Weapon"!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Shocking Reveal!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: DROOL !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: and what an appetizing Savior he is.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: He still hasn't recovered from all his injuries, so... we must save that for a later time...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Later doesn't work for me either !!!

dialogue.speaker: Caesar Clown
dialogue.text: I see. So Caesar handled all the manufacturing... Doflamingo the distribution...

dialogue.speaker: Minks
dialogue.text: ...and then those weapons would reach the likes of Kaido.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Cassar.!!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Well, rather than discussing our defeat...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: you there... your "straw hat" suits you quite well...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: In fact, long ago... ahhh... what was the name of that cat again...?

dialogue.speaker: Nekomamushi
dialogue.text: I believe you are talking about Master Nekomamushi.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Well there once was a time when I sailed the seas along with that thing...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: And I recall running into this young man, shanks, who wore a similar kind of hat... He's now become one of the hot shot "yonkos"...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: WOAAah!! You know shanks!? How!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Shanks actually gave me this H-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: He fell asleep!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: ...It is already 6pm.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It's still 6pm!! What is he, a kid!?

dialogue.speaker: Inuarashi
dialogue.text: I've gone over this before. The mokomo Dukedom is constantly under the watch of our two dukes...

dialogue.speaker: Inuarashi
dialogue.text: Duke Inuarashi is the official ruler of our land,

dialogue.speaker: Nekomamushi
dialogue.text: But master nekomamushi guards the "Whale Forest", a sacred place revered by us for genera- tions,

dialogue.speaker: Inuarashi
dialogue.text: and holds an amount of power equal to that of the Duke.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: ....so what does that have to do with the fact that he just randomly hit the hay just now!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: THE TWO... HAVE AN EXTREMELY TESTY RELA- TIONSHIP.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: As it stands now, they would likely be at each others' throats if they came across one another.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Huh?! why?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Who knows... though apparently, they used to be in-separable friends in the past...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Their fights always end in stalemates!

summary: Nekomamushi Awakens: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.
